description_long: This is a single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic taildragger configuration. The airplane features a prominent red spinner at the nose, with a two-blade propeller and a smooth, metallic gray exterior. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angles. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel at the rear.
description: A streamlined, metallic gray, single-propeller low-wing monoplane with a red nose spinner and classic taildragger landing gear. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red spinner, two-blade propeller, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with visible main landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted straight wing, and the taildragger landing gear with a small tail wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal and vertical stabilizers, the tail wheel, and the full span of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, streamlined fuselage, and the classic taildragger configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing monoplane with straight wings, no winglets, and no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit integrated into the fuselage with a streamlined canopy.
